title: Vowel Stripper
description:
⏱ Time: 5 mins
Part A: Remove vowels from paragraph.
Part B: Return "Long"/"Short".
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a function 'remove_vowels' that takes a paragraph string and returns it with all vowels (a, e, i, o, u) removed, case-insensitive.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'remove_vowels' to implement 'evaluate_paragraph(paragraph)'. If the resulting string has more than 10 characters, return 'Long', otherwise return 'Short'.
